name: Men's Rubberized Plastic Square Sunglasses - All In Motion™ Tortoise Brown: Scratch-Resistant, Maximum UV Protection, Recycled Frame
description:
Why we're ALL IN:

Finish off any look with these brown sunglasses featuring tortoiseshell print. Crafted from rubberized plastic frame for a lightweight feel. UV protection feature lenses help keep your eyes shielded from sun rays. Scratch-resistant sunglasses fit narrow faces.

All in Motion™: Inspiring the potential in every body.
